cells.xml_text_content: = 1 from July 2010 onwards for territories that are located within the Dodd-Frank treatment area.
cells.xml_raw_text_content: = 1 from July 2010 onwards for territories that are located within the Dodd-Frank treatment area.
cells.pdf_text_content: = 1 from July 2010 onwards for territories that are located within the Dodd-Frank treatment area.

cells.xml_text_content: = 1 if there was at least one conflict event described with the words: loot, pillage, plunder, rob, steal, ransack or seize. Indicates the action of an armed group against civilians.
cells.xml_raw_text_content: = 1 if there was at least one conflict event described with the words: loot, pillage, plunder, rob, steal, ransack or seize. Indicates the action of an armed group against civilians.
cells.pdf_text_content: = 1 if there was at least one conflict event described with the words: loot, pillage, plunder, rob, steal, ransack or seize. Indicates the action of an armed group against civilians.

cells.xml_text_content: = 1 if there was at least one battle event. Battles are violent interactions between two organized armed groups at a particular time and location.
cells.xml_raw_text_content: = 1 if there was at least one battle event. Battles are violent interactions between two organized armed groups at a particular time and location.
cells.pdf_text_content: = 1 if there was at least one battle event. Battles are violent interactions between two organized armed groups at a particular time and location.

cells.xml_text_content: = 1 if there was at least one event of violence against civilians; occurs when an armed group attacks civilians.
cells.xml_raw_text_content: = 1 if there was at least one event of violence against civilians; occurs when an armed group attacks civilians.
cells.pdf_text_content: = 1 if there was at least one event of violence against civilians; occurs when an armed group attacks civilians.

cells.xml_text_content: = 1 if there was at least one riot. Riots are potentially violent public demonstrations by groups.
cells.xml_raw_text_content: = 1 if there was at least one riot. Riots are potentially violent public demonstrations by groups.
cells.pdf_text_content: = 1 if there was at least one riot. Riots are potentially violent public demonstrations by groups.

cells.xml_text_content: International gold price, normalized at 1 based on the January 2004 price.

cells.pdf_text_content: International tantalum price, normalized at 1 based on the January 2004 price.

cells.xml_text_content: Monthly deviation from the 1997–2015 monthly mean, divided by the 1997–2015 SD.

cells.pdf_text_content: Monthly deviation from the 1997–2015 monthly mean, divided by the 1997–2015 SD.

cells.xml_text_content: = 1 if there was any conflict event (looting, battles, violence against civilians, riots) in an adjacent territory.
